name: AI Chat with Memory via Slack
description: Takes a user question and optional conversation context, uses Claude AI to generate a contextually aware response that maintains conversation continuity, and posts the response to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Chat with OpenAI Assistant (by adding a memory)

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the response

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the AI response

question.description: The user's question or message to the AI

conversationContext.description: Previous conversation context or memory (e.g. prior Q&A pairs, user preferences, session notes)

systemRole.description: AI persona/role (e.g. 'helpful assistant', 'coding expert', 'creative writer', 'business advisor')

userName.description: Name of the person asking the question

steps.name: Build Claude prompt with memory context
Build Slack Block Kit chat response
